name: School of Engineering Technology
description: Home to the engineering disciplines including Computer, Electrical/Electronic, Mechanical and Civil Engineering technology programmes.

name: School of Business Studies
description: Trains students in business administration, marketing and office technology management for the private and public sectors.

name: School of Sciences
description: Covers science laboratory technology and statistics, building a strong applied-science and research foundation.

name: School of Environmental Studies
description: Delivers architectural technology and estate management programmes geared towards the built environment.

name: School of Financial Studies
description: Focuses on accountancy and banking & finance, preparing graduates for the financial services sector.
